RW7.DotNetSecurityTools - create-client-credentials
Copyright (C) 2021 Reece Williams

  -t, --output-types    (Default: Console) Where to direct the output to
                        (multiple can be specified). Supported - console, file

  -d, --directory       The directory path to output the files to, if 'file'
                        selected as an output type. Defaults to a new folder on
                        the users temp path if not specified.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
